products.name: Azure Adventure Collab
products.description: Deep azure tones meet modern geometric patterns. This piece is built for durability and style.

descriptionBlocks.title: Built for Exploration
descriptionBlocks.content: Our Azure Adventure Collab isn't just a bandana; it's a piece of gear. Tested in the rugged terrains of the north, it's designed to withstand the elements while keeping your pet comfortable.

descriptionBlocks.title: Rugged Durability
descriptionBlocks.content: Close-up of the reinforced stitching and high-visibility weave.

products.name: Blossom Heart Bandana
products.description: Soft, sweet, and perfectly charming. This pink checkered bandana is adorned with delicate white hearts.

descriptionBlocks.title: A Touch of Romance
descriptionBlocks.content: Perfect for spring walks and garden parties, the Blossom Heart series is our most loved design for its delicate aesthetic and soft-to-touch feel.

products.name: Sunset Sage Bandana
products.description: A vibrant burst of autumn hues, the Sunset Sage Bandana features an intricate earthy pattern.

products.name: The Nano Banana Special
products.description: A quirky and minimalist take on the classic banana print. The Nano Banana features tiny, hand-drawn motifs.

banners.title: Sunset Sage Collection
banners.subtitle: Naturally sourced fabrics for the modern adventurer.

banners.title: Blossom & Blue
banners.subtitle: Hand-stitched details in signature seasonal hues.
